description_long: This is an old, thick book with a heavily worn, brown leather cover featuring pronounced raised bands along the spine and reinforced metal corners. The leather is scuffed and faded, with visible signs of age and use, including scratches and discoloration. The book's pages are yellowed and uneven, suggesting significant age and possibly handmade paper. The front and back covers are plain, with no visible illustration, but one corner has a small white label with a number. The spine is rounded and ribbed, with no visible text or decoration apart from the leatherwork. The overall appearance is that of an antique or historical volume, possibly a ledger or a rare manuscript.
description: A thick, antique book with a worn brown leather cover, metal corner reinforcements, and a ribbed spine. The covers are plain and aged, with yellowed pages visible from the side.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing pronounced raised bands and dark, aged leather with no visible text.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, heavily worn with a small white label in the upper left corner and metal reinforcements on two corners.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the fore-edge, revealing the thick, yellowed, and uneven pages, as well as the aged leather wrapping around the edges.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, plain and worn with two metal corner pieces and a patch of discoloration in the upper right.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is covered in dark brown, aged leather with pronounced raised bands and no visible text or decorative elements. The design is simple and utilitarian, emphasizing durability.
